Parameter.label: Append if File Already Exists (Overwrites if not selected)
True: Claim control of this call
True: Claim control of this call

Step.label: bExternalCall and not bInvalidSecurity and not bDialPlanError

Parameter.name: Condition
Parameter.value: bExternalCall and not bInvalidSecurity and not bDialPlanError

Parameter.label: True: Claim control of this call
Line groups (empty list means any line)
List of dial strings to be used
Include Answering Machine Detection in Call Analysis?
Silence Wait Timeout (seconds) (Starts after answering machine detected)
Use the dial plan? (allows intercom calls)
Create the call with the CallInitiationContext attribute set to this value
Call for which this is a consulting call (optional)
Diversion Reason 0: None 1: Unknown 2: Busy 3: No answer 4: Unavilable 5: Unconditional 6: Time of day 7: Do not disturb 8: Deflection 9: Follow-me 10: Out of service 11: Away 255: Other

Step.label: Eic_State
Step.notes: Eic_State: E = Externally Disconnected I = Internally Disconnected

Step.label: REST HTTP Request
Step.notes:
https://guardmodule-api.n-allo.dvp
c_sURLGuardAPI & c_sGetAllCurrentActive & GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "ConfigId", 0))
c_sURLGuardAPI & "/api/Guards/GetAllCurrentActiveGuardsByGuardConfig/" & GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "ConfigId", 0))

Parameter.label: Ignore Invalid SSL Certificate Date (expired certificate)
Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Unknown Host; URL=" & c_sURLGuardAPI & c_sGetAllCurrentActive

Step.label: Timeout
Step.notes: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Connection Failure; URL=" & c_sURLGuardAPI & c_sGetAllCurrentActive

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Connection Failure; URL=" & c_sURLGuardAPI & c_sGetAllCurrentActive

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Connection Failure; URL=" & c_sURLGuardAPI & c_sGetAllCurrentActive

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & " Array Parser: Failure; URL=" & c_sURLGuardAPI & c_sGetAllCurrentActive

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & " Array Parser: Array Parser Failure; URL=" & c_sURLGuardAPI & c_sGetAllCurrentActive

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: sLogSMS & "The caller didn’t record a voicemail." & "\n"

Step.label: Set sLogVoicemail = "Recorded"
Step.notes: "The caller recorded a voicemail, this is sent by mail." & "\n"

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: sLogSMS & "The caller recorded a voicemail, this is sent by mail." & "\n"

Step.label: Set sLogEmail
Step.notes:
"To: " & sGuardName & " on mobile number: " & sGuardNumber & "
" & "Time: " & sTimeOfCall & "
" & "Reason: " & sCallResult & "

"

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value:
sLogEmail & "To: " & sGuardName & " on mobile number: " & sGuardNumber & "
" & "Time: " & sTimeOfCall & "
" & "Reason: " & sCallResult & "

"

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: sLogEmail & "The caller didn’t record a voicemail." & "\n"

Step.label: Set sLogVoicemail = "Recorded"
Step.notes:
"The caller recorded a voicemail, this is sent by mail." & "\n"
sLogEmail & "The caller recorded a voicemail, you'lll find the attachment below." & "\n"

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: sLogEmail & "The caller recorded a voicemail, you'lll find the attachment below." & "\n"

Step.label: Set sLogSMS
Step.notes:
sLogEmail & "To: " & sGuardName & " on mobile number: " & sGuardNumber & "
" & "Time: " & sTimeOfCall & "
" & "Reason: " & sCallResult & "

"

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value:
sLogSMS & "To: " & sGuardName & " on mobile number: " & sGuardNumber & "
" & "Time: " & sTimeOfCall & "
" & "Reason: " & sCallResult & "

"

Step.label: JSON Parser: JSON Parser Failure
Step.notes: c_sTraceTag & " JSON Parser: JSON Parser Failure; URL=" & c_sURLGuardAPI & c_sGetAllCurrentActive

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & " JSON Parser: JSON Parser Failure; URL=" & c_sURLGuardAPI & c_sGetAllCurrentActive

Step.label: JSON Parser: Failure
Step.notes: c_sTraceTag & " JSON Parser: Failure; URL=" & c_sURLGuardAPI & c_sGetAllCurrentActive

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & " JSON Parser: Failure; URL=" & c_sURLGuardAPI & c_sGetAllCurrentActive

Step.label: Record File: File size to small
Step.notes: c_sTraceTag & "Record File: File size to small"

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "Record File: File size to small"

Step.label: Set nTimeout
Step.notes:
sConfigName & "

" & "Inbound call from " & sCallingPartyNumber & "

"
toR(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "Timeout", 0)))

Step.label: Set nTimeout
Step.notes:
sConfigName & "

" & "Inbound call from " & sCallingPartyNumber & "

"
Test(nTimeout > 0, nTimeout, 25)

Step.label: AcceptCallMenu?
Step.notes:
not StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "AcceptCallMenu", 0)), "False") or StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "AcceptCallMenu", 0)), "0")
not StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "AcceptCallMenu", 0)), "True") or StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "AcceptCallMenu", 0)), "1")

Parameter.name: Condition
Parameter.value: not StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "AcceptCallMenu", 0)), "False") or StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "AcceptCallMenu", 0)), "0")

Parameter.label: True: Claim control of this call
True: Claim control of this call

Step.label: Cannot Find Parameter
Step.notes: "Get Structured Parameter - Cannot Find Parameter; GuardRouting API URL"

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: "Get Structured Parameter - Cannot Find Parameter; GuardRouting API URL"

Step.label: Error
Step.notes: "Get Structured Parameter - Error; GuardRouting API URL"

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: "Get Structured Parameter - Error; GuardRouting API URL"

Parameter.label: Class of entry to be created

Step.label: Fallback: Success
Step.notes: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Failover - Backup data used

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Failover - Backup data used"

Step.label: Fallback: Failure
Step.notes: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Failover - Backup data not available, call failed"

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Failover - Backup data not available, call failed"

Parameter.label: Line groups (empty list means any line)
List of dial strings to be used
Diversion Reason 0: None 1: Unknown 2: Busy 3: No answer 4: Unavilable 5: Unconditional 6: Time of day 7: Do not disturb 8: Deflection 9: Follow-me 10: Out of service 11: Away 255: Other
